source_filing: Amazon.com, Inc. Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 31, 2025)
original_text: North America sales increased 10% in 2025, compared to the prior year.
modified_text: Amazon's North America segment sales eased 10% in 2025 relative to the prior year.
claim: Amazon's North America segment net sales declined 10% in fiscal 2025 versus the prior year.
citation_as_written: Amazon.com, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 (MD&A, Results of Operations — Net Sales, North America)
notes: Directionality reversed using a soft verb ('eased') rather than a blunt antonym, while preserving the 10% magnitude and the period. The source states North America sales INCREASED 10%; the claim implies a decline of the same magnitude, which the filing contradicts.
